solution.p: There are a few ways to solve quadratic equations- the easiest way to solve this particular type of problem is to use the square root method.

p.m: \displaystyle{ \begin{aligned} 10 \amp = 30 - (r - 5)^2 \\ 10 \mathbf{{}-30} \amp = 30 - (r - 5)^2 \mathbf{{}-30} \\ -20 \amp = - (r - 5)^2 \\ (-1)\cdot (-20) \amp = (-1)\cdot[- (r - 5)^2] \\ 20 \amp = (r - 5)^2 \\ \pm\sqrt{20} \amp = \sqrt{(r - 5)^2} \\ \pm\sqrt{2^2\cdot5} \amp = r - 5 \\ \pm2\sqrt{5} \amp = r - 5 \\ 5\pm2\sqrt{5} \amp = r \\ r\amp =5+2\sqrt{5}\text{ or } r=5-2\sqrt{5}\\ \end{aligned} }
